25mm Light Grenade Projectile - Training.
Only does impact damage, no BOOM BOOM.
Great for a single tanky target.
Recipe unlocks at 45.
Magazine - Explosive.

25mm Light Grenade Projectile - Fragmentation.
Does less damage in a wide area.
Great for groups of targets.
Does no damage to blocks.
Recipe unlocks at 50.
Magazine - Explosive.

25mm Light Grenade Projectile - High Explosive.
Does high damage in a small area.
Great for small groups of tanky targets.
Safe to use in small areas.
Recipe unlocks at 50.
Magazine - Explosive.
Special hunting ammunition.\nFilled with an explosive load.\nDeals high damage on impact with a 2 block AOE effect.
